size.label: Board size
size.tooBig: Board exceeds the maximum panel size.

outline.label: Outline closed
outline.open: Outline didn't close — size is an estimate, check Edge_Cuts.

count.label: Copper layer count
count.over: More layers than can be manufactured.

inner.label: Inner layers
inner.bad: Inner layers can't be made at home.

doubleSided.label: Double-sided board
doubleSided.bad: The design needs copper on both sides, but the panel is single-sided. Set the panel to double-sided in its settings.

trace.label: Min. trace width
trace.tooThin: Thinner than the process limit — may not reproduce.

minHole.label: Min. hole size
minHole.tooSmall: Smaller than the minimum hole size.

via.label: Vias
via.detail: Likely {{v}} vias (⌀ ≤ {{len}}) — without plating each is plated by hand.

space.label: Min. copper clearance
space.detail: Adjacent nets may merge during manufacturing.

annular.label: Annular ring
annular.noPadDetail: There's a hole with no copper pad.
annular.narrow: Narrow ring — risk of the drill breaking into the pad edge.

mask.label: Mask dam
mask.detail: A thin mask dam may not print.

silk.label: Silk line width ({{side}})
silk.detail: Thin silkscreen may disappear when printed.

overshoot.label: Outline overshoot
overshoot.detail: Layer features extend past the board edge.

bitSnap.label: Drill bit match
bitSnap.detail: No matching bit — use the nearest one or buy it.

thinTrace.label: Thin trace ({{side}})
thinTrace.detail: Thinner than the process limit — may not reproduce.

regionNeck.label: Pinched pour
regionNeck.detail: A neck in a filled region can lift/peel.

chrome.footer: Thresholds are set in Settings. Rows without problems are hidden.

panel.offPanel: {{count}} board(s) extend past the panel edge
panel.spacing: {{count}} board(s) are too close together or to the panel edge
panel.workArea: {{count}} board(s) are outside the machine work area
panel.keepOutTooling: {{count}} hole(s) in a machine dead zone
panel.clamp: {{count}} board(s) inside a tooling-hole clamp zone
